context.targetAudience: A conservative finance committee focused on ROI and risk mitigation with a desire to streamline operations.

scenarioA.label: Scenario A: Freelance Project Proposal (Strategic)
scenarioA.title: Strategic Workflow Efficiency Gains
scenarioA.content: Hi, I'm Jane Doe, a Lead Strategic Designer. I specialise in UI/UX Design, Product Strategy, Data Visualization. For A conservative finance committee focused on ROI and risk mitigation with a desire to streamline operations., I propose a calculated approach focusing on reducing overhead and maximising output. Based on past projects, we can increase product velocity while keeping risks minimal.
bullets: 15% increase in operational efficiency within Q1
Phased feature rollouts with clear milestone mapping
Direct alignment with your risk-mitigation goals
scenarioA.headline: ↑ 15% Efficiency

scenarioB.label: Scenario B: Freelance Project Proposal (Visionary)
scenarioB.title: Disrupting the Product Experience
scenarioB.content: Let's build something truly impactful. As a Lead Strategic Designer, I believe the best solutions are simple and delightful. I'm designing a modern, friction-free journey that eliminates redundant steps and ships features your users will love.
